pipelines.name: Anime -> Realistic
pipelines.description: Convert anime-style art into photorealistic imagery, preserving composition and subject

preset.name: [Pipeline] Anime->Realistic - Anime Base
preset.prompt: anime, masterpiece, best quality, detailed anime face, vibrant colors, cel shading, anime illustration, 1girl, detailed hair, expressive eyes
preset.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digits, cropped, ugly, mutated, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, realistic, photorealistic

preset.name: [Pipeline] Anime->Realistic - Realistic Conversion
preset.prompt: cinematic, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 8k, photorealistic, film still, anamorphic lens, color grading, natural skin texture, dslr quality, realistic proportions, professional photography
preset.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digits, cropped, ugly, mutated, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, anime, cartoon, illustration

pipelines.name: Realistic -> Fantasy
pipelines.description: Transform realistic imagery into fantasy art while keeping the subject recognizable

preset.name: [Pipeline] Realistic->Fantasy - Realistic Base
preset.prompt: cinematic, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 8k, photorealistic, film still, anamorphic lens, color grading, rim lights, professional photography
preset.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digits, cropped, ugly, mutated, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured

preset.name: [Pipeline] Realistic->Fantasy - Fantasy Stylization
preset.prompt: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, masterpiece, best quality, fantasy art, magical atmosphere, ethereal glow, fantasy elements, enchanted environment, glowing particles, mystical aura, detailed fantasy illustration, concept art, artstation
preset.negative_prompt: score_6, score_5, score_4, (worst quality, low quality:1.4), deformed, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra digit, blurry, watermark, text, modern, urban, photograph, plain
